Properties.Name: HVAC_AC_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_ac_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AC_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_ac_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AC_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_POWER_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_power_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_SYSTEM_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_power_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_SYSTEM_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_AUTO_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_auto_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AUTO_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_auto_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AUTO_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_RECIRC_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_recirc_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_RECIRCIRCULATION_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_recirc_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_RECIRCIRCULATION_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_MAX_AC_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_max_ac_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AC_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_max_ac_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_AC_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_MAX_DEFROST_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_max_defrost_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_MAX_DEFROST_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_max_defrost_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_MAX_DEFROST_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_DUAL_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_dual_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_SYNC_STATE_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_dual_state = ENUM_CLIMATE_SYNC_STATE_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_ELECTRIC_DEFROSTER_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_electric_defroster_state = ENUM_DEFROSTER_MODE_ON
Set: if <x> == false then climate_electric_defroster_state = ENUM_DEFROSTER_MODE_OFF

Properties.Name: HVAC_REAR_LOCK_ON
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == true then climate_rear_lock_state = ENUM_REAR_CLIMATE_PANEL_LOCK_ENABLE
Set: if <x> == false then climate_rear_lock_state = ENUM_REAR_CLIMATE_PANEL_LOCK_DISABLE

Properties.Name: HVAC_FAN_DIRECTION
Properties.Description: Control and receive the status of Climate controls
Value Conversions: Set: if <x> == VehicleHvacFanDirection::FLOOR then air_distribution_values = ENUM_AIR_DISTRIBUTION_FOOT
Set: if <x> == VehicleHvacFanDirection::FACE then air_distribution_values = ENUM_AIR_DISTRIBUTION_FACE
Set: if <x> == VehicleHvacFanDirection::DEFROST then air_distribution_values = ENUM_AIR_DISTRIBUTION_SCREEN
Set: if <x> == VehicleHvacFanDirection::FACE_AND_FLOOR then air_distribution_values = ENUM_AIR_DISTRIBUTION_FOOT_OR_FACE
